name: shopify store owners processing 10–50 orders/month tool
description: For shopify store owners processing 10–50 orders/month, inaccurate sales forecasting causes inventory mismanagement. We provide an automated sales forecasting model instead of manual spreadsheets and guesswork.
problem_solved: Inaccurate sales forecasting leading to inventory mismanagement.
features: simple dashboard for sales data input
